project_context.archetype: Archetype 7 (Electric & Neon) - tailored for premium gaming with magenta/purple accents matching the provided logo

fonts.usage: Body text, paragraphs, buttons, small labels

rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl md:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter uppercase
rules.countdown_numbers: text-5xl sm:text-7xl font-black tracking-tighter font-['Unbounded'] tabular-nums

logo.usage: Header left alignment and optional faded watermark in background

media.background_effect: No external image needed. Use a pure CSS technical grid background (`bg-[linear-gradient(to_right,#80808012_1px,transparent_1px),linear-gradient(to_bottom,#80808012_1px,transparent_1px)] bg-[size:24px_24px]`) combined with a central radial gradient using the `ambient_glow` color to create an epic gaming atmosphere.

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Bento Grid style for the countdown. 4 columns on desktop, 2 columns on mobile.
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous padding. Use p-8 for cards, gap-6 or gap-8 between major sections.

components_to_build.name: Header
components_to_build.design: Sticky top bar. Crystal Glassmorphism: `backdrop-blur-xl bg-background/60 border-b border-border/40`. Left: Logo (h-10). Right: Flex container with Language Toggle (PL/EN pill) and Theme Toggle (Moon/Sun icon).

components_to_build.name: Hero Section
components_to_build.design: Min-h-screen flex flex-col items-center justify-center pt-24 pb-12 text-center space-y-8 relative z-10.

components_to_build.name: CountdownTimer
components_to_build.design: Grid of 4 Glassmorphism cards. Each card contains the massive number (Unbounded font) and the label below it. Cards have 1px subtle border, soft internal shadow, and scale slightly on hover.
components_to_build.logic: Target date: 2026-04-17T20:30:00. Use standard React state + setInterval to update Days, Hours, Minutes, Seconds.

components_to_build.name: SocialLinks
components_to_build.design: Flex row of buttons. Buttons should have a solid or glowing outline effect using the primary magenta color. Icons on the left, text on the right.

components_to_build.name: Footer
components_to_build.design: Simple footer at the bottom containing the link to the '/rules' subpage, styled as an elegant text link with a subtle hover underline.

pl.heading: PRZERWA KONSERWACYJNA
pl.description: Serwer KingdomCraft jest obecnie w trakcie przerwy technicznej. Tworzymy dla Was epickie nowości. Wracamy wkrótce!

en.heading: SERVER MAINTENANCE
en.description: KingdomCraft is currently undergoing scheduled maintenance. We are building epic new features for you. We will be back soon!

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Initialize a React Router layout wrapping the entire app to support the '/' (Maintenance) and '/rules' routes.
2. Add a global state or Context for Language ('pl' | 'en'), defaulting to 'pl' (Polish). Use the translations object provided to render text dynamically.

3. Add `framer-motion` for smooth staggered entrance animations. Wrap the Hero text, Countdown Timer, and Social Links in `motion.div` with initial opacity-0 and y-10, animating to opacity-100 and y-0.
4. Install `react-icons` and use `FaDiscord`, `FaTiktok`, `FaYoutube` from `react-icons/fa` for the social media buttons.

5. For the Countdown Timer, create a robust hook that calculates the difference between `new Date()` and `new Date('2026-04-17T20:30:00')`. Ensure it handles the edge case where the time has passed (show 00:00:00:00).

6. Apply the CSS Grid Pattern for the background: In your layout wrapper, add a fixed absolute div with `-z-10 w-full h-full` using the background pattern provided in `media.background_effect`. Overlap it with a radial gradient matching `primary` color for an ambient glow behind the countdown.
7. Ensure Dark Mode is fully configured via Tailwind's `next-themes` (if available) or standard `dark` class toggle.

8. MANDATORY: Add `data-testid` attributes to all interactive elements, e.g., `data-testid='language-toggle'`, `data-testid='theme-toggle'`, `data-testid='social-discord'`, `data-testid='rules-link'`, `data-testid='countdown-days'`.
